nodes.label: amend.gif — animated demo of the commit/amend workflow UI in dragit, showing staged vs unstaged file counts, Stage All and Commit action buttons, a dark-themed git graph with commit nodes and branch lines, and a commit entry row displaying message, author, timestamp, and short hash
nodes.author: Alejandro De Cicco

nodes.label: Staged files summary panel — displays '8 staged files • 3 not staged files' with a hand-cursor hover indicator, showing the staging status widget UI
Commit action button — primary CTA with a speech-bubble/commit icon and the label 'Commit', part of the commit toolbar alongside 'Stage all'
Git graph visualization — left-side column of commit nodes (filled circles) connected by vertical lines and a pink/red branch line, representing the commit history timeline
Commit history row — shows commit message 'A commit with a message', author 'Alejandro De Cicco', relative time '1 minute ago', and short hash '#6e2a5e38' on a dark card
